column1: # Batch trade template (CSV). Drop a copy renamed without ".sample" into
# data/trades/ and the pricer loads every row as a trade.
# Every CONVENTION is per-leg (Bloomberg vocabulary). Only economic terms are
# shared. Column order does not matter (matched by name)
# behaves exactly like a blank cell -> the default below applies.
# trade_id carries ONLY the trailing unique id
#   AMEX_DAILY_IRS_<val_date>_<id> is reconstructed by the pricer.
#   trade_id                  trailing unique id number ONLY, e.g. 20496135
#   pay_fixed                 true = pay fixed/receive float, false = receive fixed/pay float
#   start_date                ISO date, effective / first accrual day
#   maturity_date             ISO date, termination / last accrual end (must be > start_date)
#   fixed_bus_day_adj         "Bus Day Adj": roll for accrual-end dates
#   fixed_eff_date_adj        "Eff Date Adj": roll for the effective date
#   fixed_adjust              acc_and_pay = accrue on adjusted dates (default)
#                             pay         = accrue on UNADJUSTED dates, adjust pay date only
#   fixed_roll_convention     forward / forward_eom (from effective, stub at back)
#                             backward / backward_eom (from maturity, stub at front)
#   fixed_payment_delay_bdays int >=0, business-day lag accrual end -> cash
#   floating_rst_bus_day_adj  "Rst Bus Day Adj": roll for the (lag-shifted) fixing date
#   floating_adjust           acc_and_pay (default) | pay | none (same meaning as fixed_adjust)
#   floating_lockout_bdays    int >=0 frozen fixings at period end
#   --- Optional holiday-extras columns (add by name only if needed) ---

column2: /," separated ISO dates of extra closures

column1: #   ..._extras_file : path to a CSV/TXT/XLSX list of extra closure dates
#   floating_rst_bus_day_adj and floating_reset_lag_bdays blank and the row
#   reproduces a Bloomberg ticket exactly (Bloomberg derives them the same way).
# VALIDATION: invalid roll_convention/adjust, maturity<=start, an unregistered
#   calendar, or an unsupported reset/payment type => HARD ERROR (row rejected).
#   adjust=acc_and_pay with an EOM roll or a 30/360 day-count => WARNING only

column2: logged to manifest.warnings -- a reconciliation flag).

column1: # Lines starting with # are ignored. Blank rows are ignored.
